title: Team start: WS1 token measurement display
body:
Team start report:
- Identity: Shaded Shrouding Mask / codex / GPT-5 / 019e26.
- Foundation: complete; live check found no active claims, no active commit queue, and clean git status before registration.
- Claimed paths: agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.ts and agent-tools/src/practice-fitness.
- Useful capability: implementation and focused validation for the Practice fitness/token measurement slice.
- Constraint or risk: WS1 only; no token frontmatter, convention docs, or manifest coverage before WS1 lands and validates.
- Preferred boundary: solo implementer unless live coordination pressure appears.
